title: Chiseled Book fix
description: It just makes so chiseled book shelfs count as bookshelf for the enchantment table
body:
# What does it do?
It just adds the chiseled bookshelf to the "enchantment_power_provider"

### Does it need the books to work?
No, but i may make it need in the future, if someone else does it, ill add the link here 

i hope you will enjoy this lil thing :D
